questionHtml:
Bromate and bromide ions react in acidic aqueous solution.

BrO3− (aq) + 5Br− (aq) + 6H+ (aq) → 3Br2 (l) + 3H2O (l)

The following rate data was collected.

Determine the value and unit of the rate constant using the rate expression in (a).

meta.title: Determine the value and unit of the rate constant using the rate expression in (a).
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.2—How fast? The rate of chemical change

Reactivity 2.2.11—The rate constant, k, is temperature dependent and its units are determined from the overall order of the reaction. Solve problems involving the rate equation, including the units of k.
